summary: Tested mobile PWA redesign (PlayerDex-inspired) for iteration 37. All backend tests passed (13/13). All frontend features verified working: home view with team cards, children section, quick stats (€ currency), team view with Schedule/Roster/Νέα tabs, event detail with Going/Not Going buttons, player profile with attendance stats and restricted view for non-kids, profile page with avatar upload and edit mode.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav - requires force=True for clicks. z-index already set to z-[9999] but badge still intercepts.

test_credentials: Parent OTP login: phone='+357 99 555666' at /app/login. OTP returned in debug response field 'otp_debug'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA redesign complete. All features working: (1) Home view: team cards with group name/player count/kid avatar stack, 'Τα παιδιά μου' section, quick stats with € currency. (2) Team view: Schedule/Roster/Νέα tabs, events with date badges and type tags. (3) Event detail: Going/Not Going buttons work (POST /api/mobile/availability). (4) Player profile: own kid shows full stats + parent info, other players show restricted message. (5) Profile page: avatar upload, edit mode (name/email editable, phone locked), logout. Navigation uses internal state, not URL routing.
